reason: bluesky-creds.json missing on DreamHost server. GitHub Actions SSH succeeded (port 22 reachable from GH runners) but /home/dh_yadmw3/artonly.io/agent/bluesky-creds.json does not exist.

articles_identified.title: Graham Coxon Finds a Lost Record and It Was Worth the Wait
hemlocke springs: Four Years of Building What the Moment Could Not Give Her

action_taken: Gmail draft created (ID: r-4720298389573392232) to amosleblanc@gmail.com with instructions to generate Bluesky App Password and save credentials file. Log committed to vossadvisory repo.
resolution_needed: Log into bsky.app as artonly.bsky.social, generate App Password at Settings > Privacy > App Passwords, then SSH to server and create: ~/artonly.io/agent/bluesky-creds.json with {"handle": "artonly.bsky.social", "app_password": "xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx"}
note: Cloud environment cannot reach DreamHost port 22. GitHub Actions CAN reach it (confirmed today). Future runs should continue using the GH Actions dispatch pattern.
